result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 4:          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) ...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_handle AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) oh ON oh.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
owner_case_counts AS (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM case_handle
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ch.owner_id AS id
FROM case_handle ch
JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON occ.owner_id = ch.owner_id
GROUP BY ch.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(ch.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_handle AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) oh ON oh.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
owner_case_counts AS (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM case_handle
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ch.owner_id AS id
FROM case_handle ch
JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON occ.owner_id = ch.owner_id
GROUP BY ch.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(ch.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_created, MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_created, COUNT(*) AS total_cases, SUM(CASE WHEN closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_cases FROM "Case";

exec_args.sql: SELECT MIN(createddate::timestamp) AS min_created, MAX(createddate::timestamp) AS max_created, COUNT(*) AS total_cases, SUM(CASE WHEN closeddate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_cases FROM "Case";

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_recent, COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS owners
FROM base;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_recent, COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS owners
FROM base;

args.query:
WITH one_owner AS (
  SELECT caseid__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
base AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN one_owner oo ON oo.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_recent_not_transferred,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS owners,
       SUM(CASE WHEN ownerid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_owner
FROM base;

  JOIN one_owner oo ON oo.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS closed_recent_not_transferred,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ownerid) AS owners,
       SUM(CASE WHEN ownerid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_owner
FROM base;

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH one_owner AS (
  SELECT caseid__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
case_handle AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN one_owner oo ON oo.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
owner_case_counts AS (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM case_handle
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT ch.owner_id AS id
FROM case_handle ch
JOIN owner_case_counts occ ON occ.owner_id = ch.owner_id
GROUP BY ch.owner_id
ORDER BY AVG(ch.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH one_owner AS (
  SELECT caseid__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
case_handle AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN one_owner oo ON oo.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_sec
FROM case_handle
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY cnt DESC, avg_sec ASC
LIMIT 50;

args.query:
WITH one_owner AS (
  SELECT caseid__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
),
case_handle AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN one_owner oo ON oo.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cnt>1) AS owners_gt1
FROM (
  SELECT owner_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM case_handle
  GROUP BY owner_id
) t;

result.preview: "No agent processed more than one non-transferred closed case in the past four months, so there is no qualifying agent Id."
